title: Remodeled Minecraft
description: Vanilla friendly pack that changes a bunch of textures and models for the better!
body:
![logo](https://i.postimg.cc/cHYsBMkr/Title-Reverse-Render.png) ## How I like to play Minecraft I created this pack because I wanted to change a lot of various aspects about the game and how it looked. This pack changes textures, models, environment, GUI, colormaps, pretty much every aspect of the game... I've tried to stay as vanilla-like as I can while still improving the different elements
**Hope you enjoy this pack!** ![Saplings](https://i.postimg.cc/Bbqkc5Kb/2025-03-31-22-14-50.png)
Comparison Images ![Birch Forest](https://i.postimg.cc/t45KsHNn/13.png) ![Snow Village](https://i.postimg.cc/y8yH0Rsd/2.png) ![Mansion](https://i.postimg.cc/7ZwvPL0y/12.png) ![Swamp](https://i.postimg.cc/BvZGpvnC/3.png) ![Nether Foretress](https://i.postimg.cc/JhTC2WyC/8.png) ![The End](https://i.postimg.cc/x8M7nrdC/20.png)
Item Previews ![Items](https://i.postimg.cc/fygHZWnM/items_copy.png) Unique item textures, enchanted books, paintings, firework rockets, goat horns and more! ![Enchanted books](https://i.postimg.cc/vTTCS2W7/enchanted-books.png) ![Unique Paintings](https://i.postimg.cc/WzyxRmnB/paintings.png)
Item Animations _!Not ingame speed!_ ![Axolotl](https://i.postimg.cc/26TVtPQd/axolotl_bucket.gif) ![Ender Pearl](https://i.postimg.cc/sxXvCwmk/ender_pearl.gif) ![Prismarine Shard](https://i.postimg.cc/Y0sjrYyh/prismarine_shard.gif) ![Redstone Dust](https://i.postimg.cc/Y2nvzBqM/redstone.gif)
Optifine is needed for: ``` Custom light- and colormaps Random mobs textures (From Minecraft Earth++) Custom Item Textures (Including new elytra models) Block Overlays (Block transitions and some custom biome-dependant textures) Custom sky overlay (4K Sky texture for day/night and weather) Custom GUI (Chest & Shulker and loading screens) ```
If you have any feedback or any questions, the best place to reach me is on the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/Gf7uPVPHZh) ![Discord](https://i.postimg.cc/mr9yt5k9/discord.png)
